harness.js:28:1-39:4
> exec(cmd, function(err, output) {
  if (! ! err) {
    if ((err["code"] === 1)) { console["log"]("the content is null!"); } else { console["error"](("getPsInfo failed! " + err["stack"])); }
    callback(err, null);
    return ;
  }
  format(param, output, callback);
});
